name: Kanuri
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Kanuri is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Kanuri is a Saharan (Nilo-Saharan) language of Nigeria, Niger, Chad and Cameroon. It is written both in the Latin script (the modern standard, with letters such as ǝ and digraphs) and, traditionally, in the Ajami (Arabic) script. INPUT CONTRACT: Latin-script Kanuri orthography; Arabic-script (Ajami) input is out of scope. `kr` is a macrolanguage code (Manga and Yerwa Kanuri). Glottolog: `kr` is the Kanuri macrolanguage, so `kanu1279` is a family node by necessity.
